title: TPA
description: A TPA mod for fabric 1.21.10 servers
body:
A TPA mod for fabric servers (currently only for 1.21.10)
# This mod probably won't be supported
Consider using [BlossomTpa](https://modrinth.com/mod/blossomtpa) instead, which is still supported and is compatible with other versions and also is server side
## Commands
- /tpa - for sending TPA requests
- /tpahere - for sending TPA requests that send the acceptor to your location
- /tpalist - for listing your ingoing and outgoing TPA requests
- /tpaaccept - for accepting your ingoing TPA requests
- /tpacancel - for canceling your outgoing TPA requests
